case_title: MENDOZA, TEODORO S. et al vs. GUEVARRA, IRENE VARGAS, AKA IRENE SANTOS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, TEODORO S. MENDOZA, ENGRACIA M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, TEODORO S. MENDOZA, ENGRACIA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUEVARRA, IRENE VARGAS, AKA IRENE SANTOS GUEVARRA, JESUS UBUNGEN, EMILDA GUEVARRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 853 ROLPH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $5,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, AS TO TERMS AND CONDITIONS... SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH....................... STIPULATED............................... NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF LUCILLE GOINS DIMMICK FILED RE: MEMO OF POINTS, ETC.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY, PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, TEODORO S. MENDOZA, ENGRACIA M. JUDGMENT OF JAN-05-2000 SET ASIDE
